title: Funky Crispy Irish Sauerkraut Stir-Fry
description: A snappy and festive Irish dish featuring white sauerkraut, stir-fry, and whole30-friendly ingredients. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
name: Sour Cream or Greek Yogurt
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the bacon and cook until crispy, about 4-5 minutes.
Remove the bacon from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the skillet.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the white sauerkraut and cook for 2-3 minutes, until slightly browned.
Add the cooked bacon back into the skillet.
Stir in the fresh parsley, thyme, salt, and black pepper.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the flavors have melded together.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
